result: The data cleaning task has been completed successfully. The R script loaded all four wave datasets from data/input/, merged them by NSID using full_join, recoded all wave-specific missing value codes to the standard scheme (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know/insufficient information, -3=Not asked/interviewed, -2=Script error/lost, -1=Item not applicable), derived banded income variables for ages 14-15 from continuous data, converted all banded variables to factors with descriptive labels, and output the cleaned dataset with the required variables (NSID, incwhh14, incwhh15, incwhhcnt14, incwhhcnt15, incwhh16, incwhh17) to data/output/cleaned_data.csv.
